# third_party

Vendored upstream trees (not git submodules).

| Path | Upstream | Notes |
|------|----------|-------|
| [`bedside/`](bedside/) | https://github.com/tig/bedside | Contract, surface, eval, CLI. See `bedside/VENDOR.md` for pin SHA. |

Refresh by replacing the tree from a new upstream commit and updating `bedside.toml` + `VENDOR.md`. Portable gaps: file issues on the upstream repo.
